title: BAI Releases Minutes for April Para Badminton Meeting
indian_angle: The Badminton Association of India has published the minutes from its April 21st meeting, which included discussions pertinent to the development of para-badminton in India.
summary: The Badminton Association of India (BAI) has released the minutes from its meeting held on April 21, 2026, which covered various aspects related to para-badminton.

title: Grassroot Coaches Development Program Announced for Guwahati & Raipur
indian_angle: This circular details a crucial coaches development program aimed at the grassroots level, taking place in Indian cities Guwahati and Raipur, fostering future badminton talent.
summary: The BAI has issued a circular for a Coaches Development Program at the grassroots level, scheduled to take place in National Centre of Excellence (NCE) Guwahati and Raipur from June 12th to 21st, 2026.

title: Indian Shuttlers Eye Upcoming International Tournaments
indian_angle: This story outlines the potential next international tournament destinations for top Indian players Chirag-Prannoy, Ayush Shetty, and PV Sindhu.
summary: Top Indian badminton players Chirag-Prannoy, Ayush Shetty, and PV Sindhu are planning their next international tournament appearances, with potential destinations including Argentina, Spain, Portugal, and Germany.

title: Coach Tan Kim Her's Strategy for Hari-Arjun's Doubles Partnership
indian_angle: This feature delves into the strategic pairing of Hariharan Amsakarunan and Arjun M.R. by doubles coach Tan Kim Her, highlighting the development of India's next generation of men's doubles players.
summary: Doubles coach Tan Kim Her discusses his approach to forming the new partnership of Hariharan Amsakarunan and Arjun M.R., following the success of Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty.

title: Ayush Shetty Challenges World No 15 Weng Hong Yang
indian_angle: Young Indian talent Ayush Shetty delivered a strong performance against Chinese World No. 15 Weng Hong Yang, showcasing his potential on the international stage.
summary: Ayush Shetty put up a strong fight against China's World No. 15 Weng Hong Yang, indicating his growing prowess in international badminton.

title: India Invites EOI for BWF World Championships 2026
indian_angle: The Badminton Association of India has invited Expressions of Interest for hosting the BWF World Championships 2026, a significant step for Indian badminton on the global stage.
summary: The Badminton Association of India (BAI) has issued an Expression of Interest (EOI) for the BWF World Championships 2026, indicating India's potential to host the prestigious event.
